summary: 2026-06-14 09:03:45 PDT - Reviewed `git diff 02bf751...HEAD`, `git log --oneline 02bf751..HEAD`, and `reviews/display-update-cadence.md`. The new runtime change adds `config.displayIntervalSeconds` to the existing overlay refresh effect, which matches the approved fix and re-posts the current overlay payload when cadence changes while the overlay is on. No new issues found in the post-02bf751 changes.
